data.title: Remove the pretext text system (overkill for one People-page line)

data.body:
The pretext components (PretextParagraph/Heading/Label) run custom @chenglou/pretext line-layout, but PretextParagraph is used ONCE (PeoplePage, a single teaser sentence) and Heading/Label are dead (0 uses). Remove the whole pretext system: components/pretext/ (+ index), src/lib/pretext.ts, src/hooks/use-pretext.ts. Repoint PeoplePage's PretextParagraph to a plain

(keep the existing font-light + text-white so it reads on the gold bg; drop the TEXT_SIZES import). KEEP @chenglou/pretext + components/typeset/JustifiedParagraph (used in Navbar) + lib/typeset/knuthPlass.ts — that's a SEPARATE live justified-text system that shares the dep; do not touch it or remove the dependency. Verify Navbar/JustifiedParagraph still build/work. Octahedron node tooltip inline style is legit (3D Html overlay) — out of scope.

Cold review (independent sub-agent): PASS. All 6 pretext files deleted; grep Pretext/use-pretext/@/lib/pretext = no refs. CRITICAL check clear: @chenglou/pretext still in package.json; git diff on src/components/typeset + src/lib/typeset = empty (JustifiedParagraph + knuthPlass untouched, import the dep directly); Navbar still imports/renders JustifiedParagraph. PeoplePage repoint correct (

, imports removed). Gates: typecheck/build/conformance pass; tests 7 failed/159 passed (FRAC-199 set, no new). Move to done.
